author: Group09_HCMUS
name: HCMUS: Value Residuals & Parallel Blocks
blurb: 9L 512d U-Net (4-5) featuring sigmoid-gated Value Residuals, Parallel Attention+MLP blocks, and Stochastic Depth (0.1). Includes EMA(0.997), XSA refinement, SmearGate, and BigramHash(4096). Compiled with int8+zlib compression. 17.6M params in 14.63MB. Trained for 20k steps on RTX Pro 6000.
